siteDescription: Play, drink, eat - everything at one table. Visit the best board game bar for all board game enthusiasts.
pageDescription: Experience the best board game bar in town. Play from our collection of 300+ games while enjoying craft beer and delicious food.

hero.title: Play, drink, eat
hero.subtitle: everything at one table
hero.description: Entry fee for board game players who order from us and for customers with zero spending.

about.description: Entry fee for board game players. Entry fee is valid for 1 day without time limit. For children under 15 years old, entry is free. MONDAY WITHOUT ENTRY FEE.

metadata.title: Deskohub - Board Game Bar
metadata.description: Play, drink, eat - everything at one table. Visit the best board game bar for all board game enthusiasts.

reservation.pageDescription: Reserve your table at Deskohub board game bar. Choose your preferred date, time, and table type for the perfect gaming experience.

reservationConfirmation.pageDescription: Your table reservation at Deskohub has been successfully confirmed. Check your booking details and confirmation.

booking.pageDescription: Reserve your perfect spot at Deskohub. Choose your date, time, and preferences for an unforgettable board game experience.
booking.durationLabel: How long will you be staying?
booking.contactDescription: Your contact details for booking confirmation
booking.preOrderDetailsPlaceholder: Please specify your food and drink preferences...
booking.pricingInfo: Entry fee: 50 CZK with order, 100 CZK without order
booking.successMessage: Your table reservation has been submitted successfully. We will contact you shortly to confirm your booking.
booking.errorMessage: There was an error processing your booking. Please try again or contact us directly.
booking.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
booking.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

datetime.mustBeFuture: Date and time must be in the future
datetime.outsideWorkingHours: Please select a time during our working hours
datetime.durationExceedsWorkingHours: Your reservation extends beyond our closing time. Please select a shorter duration or an earlier time.

guestCount.integer: Number of guests must be a whole number

name.minimum: Name must be at least {min} characters
name.maximum: Name must be less than {max} characters
name.invalid: Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
email.maximum: Email must be less than {max} characters

phone.minimum: Please enter a valid phone number
phone.invalid: Please enter a valid phone number

specialRequests.maximum: Special requests must be less than {max} characters

preOrders.maximum: Pre-orders must be less than {max} characters

thankYou.title: Thank You for Your Reservation!
thankYou.confirmation: Your booking has been received and is being processed.
thankYou.nextStepsDescription: You will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours. Please check your inbox and spam folder. If you need to make changes, please contact us immediately.
thankYou.contactInfo: Feel free to contact us if you need to modify your reservation

errors.bookingNotFoundDescription: We couldn't find a reservation with this ID. The booking may have expired or the link may be incorrect.
errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you are looking for doesn't exist.
errors.submissionError: An error occurred while submitting your booking
errors.contactError: If you believe this is an error, please contact us with your booking details.

descriptions.dateTime: Choose your preferred date and time
descriptions.tableType: Choose the type of table that suits your needs
descriptions.confirmationTime: We'll confirm your booking within 24 hours
descriptions.keepInfo: Please keep this information for your records

reservationMetadata.title: Reservation Confirmation | Deskohub
reservationMetadata.description: Thank you for your reservation at Deskohub

training.pageDescription: Perfect space for corporate events, workshops and team building activities at Deskohub

hero.title: Team Building
hero.subtitle: in the training room
hero.description: Ideal space for corporate events, workshops and team building activities. Combine business with pleasure through board games.

feature1.title: Flexible Space
feature1.description: Spacious room with modular setup for 10-50 people

feature2.title: Modern Equipment
feature2.description: Projector, screen, flipchart and everything needed for presentations

feature3.title: Team Building Activities
feature3.description: Wide selection of board games for team building and ice-breaker activities

feature4.title: Catering
feature4.description: Complete catering services including coffee breaks and lunches

cta.title: Ready to plan your event?
cta.description: Contact us today and let's create an unforgettable event for your team together.

reservation.pageDescription: Book our training room for your corporate event, workshop, or team building activity at Deskohub

trainingReservation.pageDescription: Book our spacious training room for corporate events, workshops, and team building activities. Complete your reservation at Deskohub.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.subtitle: Oops! You rolled the wrong combination!
notFound.description: It looks like you rolled the wrong combination! Try again or return to the home page for another game.
notFound.footerMessage: Join us for another game at Deskohub!

contact.pageDescription: Get in touch with Deskohub - board game bar in Prague. Contact information, opening hours, and location.
contact.heroSubtitle: Get in touch with us and book your table for an unforgettable gaming experience
contact.formDescription: Have a question or want to book a table? Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
